title: The Establishment of the Nguyen Dynasty
summary: In 1802, after a long period of war, Nguyen Anh ascended the throne, took the era name Gia Long, and began the Nguyen Dynasty.

slides.text: Hey kids! After the Tay Son Dynasty ended, Nguyen Anh unified the country and ascended the throne in 1802, taking the title Gia Long.
slides.imagePrompt: Coronation of King Gia Long in Hue, ancient palace with yellow tiles, golden banners, solemn atmosphere, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He chose Phu Xuan (Hue) as the capital. This is where the poetic Perfume River (Huong River) flows through and where beautiful palaces were built.
slides.imagePrompt: Imperial City of Hue, the Forbidden Purple City, Perfume River (Sông Hương) with a dragon boat, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: In 1804, the King officially named our country 'Viet Nam'. That is the sacred and proud name of our nation today!
slides.imagePrompt: King Gia Long writing the characters 'VIET NAM' in gold on a large scroll, Map of a united Vietnam in the background, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The Nguyen court built the massive and solid Hue Citadel, with soaring red brick walls.
slides.imagePrompt: Close-up of the masonry walls of Hue Citadel, soldiers on patrol, large flags flying, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: In what year was the Nguyen Dynasty established?
What sacred name did King Gia Long officially give to our country in 1804?
